phases.name: Quick Fixes - Magic Values & Constants
phases.goal: Eliminate hardcoded values and improve type safety with minimal risk

tasks.description: Fix timeout error message mismatch in status_logs.py
steps: Change error message on line 413 from 'timed out after 30 seconds' to 'timed out after 15 seconds' to match actual timeout=15

tasks.description: Replace hardcoded log level lists with VALID_LEVELS constant in status_logs.py
steps: Replace hardcoded ['DEBUG', 'INFO', 'WARN', 'ERROR', 'CRITICAL'] at lines 447 and 572 with sorted(level for level in VALID_LEVELS if level != 'WARNING')

tasks.description: Extract USER_MODE_SERVICES constant from status_logs.py to constants/services.py
steps: Replace hardcoded ['celery_worker', 'celery_beat'] at lines 268 and 276 with USER_MODE_SERVICES
tasks.verification: grep -n 'USER_MODE_SERVICES' backend/app/constants/services.py && grep -n 'celery_worker.*celery_beat' backend/app/api/status_logs.py | wc -l should be 0

tasks.description: Fix redundant condition check in strategy_monitoring_tasks.py
steps: Change line 377 from 'if not rows or len(rows) == 0:' to 'if not rows:'

tasks.description: Extract AgentRunStatus enum from magic strings in base.py
steps: Add AgentRunStatus enum with values: RUNNING, COMPLETED, ERROR, MAX_ITERATIONS
Replace string literals 'completed', 'error', 'max_iterations', 'running' with enum members

tasks.description: Remove VALID_EVENT_TYPES duplication - derive from MarketEventType
steps: Replace VALID_EVENT_TYPES set with typing.get_args(MarketEventType) derivation
Import get_args from typing and MarketEventType from models
tasks.verification: grep -n 'VALID_EVENT_TYPES.*=' backend/app/api/market.py should show derivation pattern

tasks.description: Extract SUMMITFLOW_API constant to shared location in AgentPanel
steps: Update AgentPanel.tsx to import SUMMITFLOW_API from ./constants
Update EvidenceCaptureModal.tsx to import SUMMITFLOW_API from ./constants
tasks.verification: grep -rn 'SUMMITFLOW_API' frontend/components/agents/ | grep -v 'constants.ts' | grep 'const SUMMITFLOW_API' | wc -l should be 0

phases.name: Dead Code & DRY Violations
phases.goal: Remove unused code and consolidate duplicate logic

tasks.description: Remove dead code - adopt HealthCheckStrategy.get_check_decision() in sitemap_service.py
steps: Read backend/app/services/health_check_strategies.py to understand CheckDecision and get_check_decision
Update check_entry_health() to use CheckDecision.should_skip and CheckDecision.is_probe
Run ruff check and pytest tests/unit/services/test_sitemap_service.py if exists

tasks.description: Stagger schedule collisions at 3:00 UTC in celery_schedules.py
steps: Identify all 5 tasks scheduled at hour=3, minute=0
Stagger them: scan-system-capabilities (3:00), calculate-fear-greed-daily (3:02), monitor-thesis-health-daily (3:05), daily-rules-validation (3:08), weekly-optimization-review (3:10)
Add comment explaining deliberate staggering to prevent future collisions
tasks.verification: grep -c 'hour=3, minute=0' backend/app/celery_schedules.py should be 1 or less

tasks.description: Create intraday refresh task helper in celery_schedules.py
steps: Extract helper function _create_intraday_refresh_tasks(time_label: str, hour: int, minute_offset: int)
Function generates the 3-task pattern (OHLCV refresh -> populate inputs -> calculate F&G)
Replace 4 repetitive task definitions with 4 function calls

phases.name: Type Safety & Error Handling
phases.goal: Improve type safety and standardize error handling patterns

tasks.description: Fix synchronous setState in useEffect in AgentPanel.tsx
steps: Replace synchronous setState calls for serverUrl/wsUrl with lazy initialization
Use useState(() => getServerUrl()) pattern instead of useEffect + setState
Remove the useEffect that sets serverUrl/wsUrl

tasks.description: Fix type: ignore comments in market.py with proper typing
steps: Define proper TypedDict for calculate_putcall_context return
Add explicit tuple unpacking types for repository methods
tasks.verification: grep -c 'type: ignore' backend/app/api/market.py should be reduced

tasks.description: Standardize datetime handling in strategy_monitoring_tasks.py
steps: Replace datetime.now() with datetime.now(UTC) at line 147
Replace date.today() with datetime.now(UTC).date() at lines 183, 344, 400
Ensure UTC is imported from datetime module

tasks.description: Create @handle_api_errors decorator for watchlist.py error handling
steps: Create @handle_api_errors decorator that catches HTTPException (re-raise) and Exception (log + raise 500)
Apply decorator to all 10 endpoints that have try-except boilerplate

phases.name: Function Extraction & Modularization
phases.goal: Break down large functions and improve single responsibility

tasks.description: Extract _enrich_indicator_with_history to market_transformers.py
steps: Move function to market_transformers.py as enrich_indicator_with_history()
Update market.py to import from market_transformers

tasks.description: Extract systemd message filtering helper in status_logs.py
steps: Update parse_journal_output to use the new helper

tasks.description: Extract dual/legacy review handlers in watchlist.py review_strategy_signal
steps: Refactor review_strategy_signal to use these helpers

tasks.description: Split celery_schedules.py get_beat_schedule into task category helpers
steps: Each returns a dict fragment that gets merged in get_beat_schedule()
Update get_beat_schedule() to merge all helper results

phases.name: Component Decomposition (Frontend)
phases.goal: Break down large React components into smaller, focused sub-components

tasks.description: Extract MaintenanceSummaryStats component from MaintenanceTable.tsx
steps: Extract lines 408-427 (summary stats grid) to new component
Import and use MaintenanceSummaryStats in MaintenanceTable

tasks.description: Extract useDialogState hook from MaintenanceTable.tsx
steps: Extract 7 dialog-related useState calls into the hook
Update MaintenanceTable to use the new hook

tasks.description: Extract AgentPanelHeader component from AgentPanel.tsx
steps: Extract header section (connection status, page context, sessions button, badges)
Define props interface with required callbacks

phases.name: Repository Pattern & Data Access
phases.goal: Move raw SQL to storage layer following established patterns

tasks.description: Create ReferenceRepository for reference_tasks.py SQL queries
steps: Add methods: get_latest_cache_entry(), upsert_valuation_metrics(), upsert_financial_health_scores(), upsert_risk_metrics(), get_stale_symbols()
Update reference_tasks.py to use new repository

tasks.description: Move raw SQL from strategy_monitoring_tasks.py to StrategyStorage
steps: Update strategy_monitoring_tasks.py to use storage methods

phases.name: Final Verification
phases.goal: Ensure all changes maintain test coverage and functionality

tasks.description: Run full backend test suite
steps: If failures, document which tests fail and whether pre-existing
tasks.verification: pytest exit code 0 or documented pre-existing failures

tasks.description: Run frontend lint and type check
tasks.verification: No new lint or type errors

tasks.description: Run backend type check
